column4: Validate the platform sustains 200 solutions/month throughput with no quota throttle events or Bedrock spend overruns

column6:

2. Execute 4-hour sustained load test

column4: Validate per-solution Claude Sonnet 4.6 + Haiku 4.5 combined token spend remains at or below $5.00 target
column5: Production-equivalent environment; token usage instrumentation emitting AmatraPlatform/TokenCostUSD metric; five representative briefs of varying complexity
column6:
1. Generate solutions for 5 representative briefs (SMB mid-market enterprise simple complex)
2. Record per-phase token counts for Sonnet 4.6 and Haiku 4.5 from DynamoDB solution_state.token_usage_by_phase
3. Calculate cost using documented pricing ($0.003/$0.015 per 1K Sonnet; $0.0008/$0.004 per 1K Haiku)
4. Compare against $5.00 budget
5. Verify CLI amatra status surfaces token spend
column7: Per-solution cost ≤ $5.00 for all 5 test briefs; AmatraPlatform/TokenCostUSD custom metric within budget; Haiku 4.5 used for all EO Validator invocations (confirmed by phase breakdown)
column13: DDD §SLA Expectations — Per-Solution Bedrock Token Spend; SOW §Success Metrics — $5 token spend target; IG §Application Configuration — Bedrock Model Configuration
column14: Alert at 90% of budget threshold per YAML config

column4: Validate Lambda cold start latency does not materially impact P95 solution latency and reserved concurrency prevents starvation
column5: All 11 Lambda routes deployed with ARM64 Graviton2; reserved concurrency configured per route; CloudWatch X-Ray enabled
column6:

2. Record cold start duration from X-Ray traces
3. Submit 50 rapid-fire solution initiation requests to test burst concurrency
4. Verify no reserved concurrency throttle events in CloudWatch
5. Verify X-Ray service map shows complete call graph
column7: Lambda cold start < 2 seconds for all functions; no ConcurrencyLimitExceeded errors under 50 concurrent requests; X-Ray traces complete with non-null correlation IDs
column13: DDD §Infrastructure — Compute Sizing; IG §Infrastructure Deployment — Compute
column14: ARM64 Graviton2 provides ~20% cost advantage vs x86

column3: OWASP API Top 10 — All 11 Lambda Routes
column4: Validate all 11 Lambda API routes comply with OWASP API Security Top 10 controls
column5: All 11 Lambda routes deployed; OWASP ZAP configured; admin and non-admin Cognito test accounts prepared
column6:
1. Test API1 (Broken Object Level Authorisation): access another user's solution_id with valid JWT (expect 403)
2. Test API4 (Unrestricted Resource Consumption): exceed per-route throttle limit (expect 429)
3. Test API5 (Broken Function Level Authorisation): call GET /admin/usage without admin Cognito group (expect 403)
4. Test API8 (Security Misconfiguration): confirm HTTPS-only; no plaintext endpoints
5. Test remaining OWASP API Top 10 controls per IG checklist
column7: HTTP 403 on cross-user access; HTTP 429 on throttle breach; HTTP 403 on admin route without admin scope; HTTPS enforced on all routes; all 10 OWASP controls pass
